· cases/:id/aggregate · POST next-bundle
· POST park (B4) · POST workstation (A2)

getToday · aggregate · start · complete
· parkRemaining · claimWorkstation

color: rgb(238, 241, 246) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TeamleadController
/api/teamlead/* cases · bundles · dashboards
· assignments/recalculate|preview|export-zst
· cases/:id/return-to-bucher|complete-intake (Intake-Gate D1)
· cases/:id/resolve-problems (Problemfall→problem_resolved)
· delivery-groups/merge|split|release (D2)
· cases/lookup (WE-Nr) · cases/search (A1/A2/B1 assign-flow search+browse) · cases/:id/flag-attention|unflag-attention
· cases/:id/forward|unforward
· bundles/:id/withdraw|add|reorder|pause|resume · employees/:no/assign
· employees/:no/assign-bundle (A1/A2) · bundles/:id/cases/:caseId/move (B2)

assignToEmployee/assignBundleToEmployee (find-or-create) · moveCase

auch von prisma/seed.ts + Int-Tests genutzt
